title.en: SPIRE: The Workload Identity Control Plane in Enterprise Zero-Trust Systems
title.zh: SPIRE：企业零信任体系中的工作负载身份控制平面

summary.en: A product and architecture study of SPIRE in enterprise zero-trust systems, covering SPIFFE, workload identity, SVID, trust domains, federation, mTLS, Envoy SDS, Vault and cloud IAM integration, large-scale deployment cost, ROI, enterprise use cases, adopters, current releases, and open engineering issues.
summary.zh: 研究 SPIRE 在企业零信任体系中的产品定位与架构价值，覆盖 SPIFFE、工作负载身份、SVID、信任域、联邦互信、mTLS、Envoy SDS、Vault 与云 IAM 集成、大规模部署成本、ROI、企业使用场景、采用方、当前版本与仍存在的工程问题。

readingDirection.en: Read this when evaluating SPIRE, SPIFFE, workload identity, service-to-service mTLS, secretless access, cross-cloud identity federation, or zero-trust identity infrastructure for enterprise platforms.
readingDirection.zh: 适合在评估 SPIRE、SPIFFE、工作负载身份、服务间 mTLS、无密钥访问、跨云身份联邦或企业零信任身份基础设施时阅读。
